title: Changes to Ofsted inspection fees for independent schools
body: "We are seeking views on proposed changes to fees that His Majesty’s Inspector of Education, Children’s Services and Skills charges for inspections of some independent schools.  We have proposed annual increases to fees, for 5 years, for:   standard inspections progress monitoring inspections pre-registration inspections   We have also proposed making the fee for a pre-registration inspection payable before the inspection. "
